bullets.heading: End-to-end device development
bullets.description: 13+ medical devices from ideation through prototyping, design, testing, and refinement.

bullets.heading: Verification & validation
bullets.description: Bench test rigs, IQ/DQ/OQ/PQ protocols, and hands-on V&V across Class I–III devices.

bullets.heading: Production engineering
bullets.description: Sole developer of 4 production machines; 200+ surgical tools used in theatre settings.

bullets.heading: Materials & CAD mastery
bullets.description: Biocompatible polymers database, SolidWorks macros, and complex mechanical assemblies.

bullets.heading: Regulatory & commercial readiness
bullets.description: CE marking on 2 devices with 1 in submission; ISO 13485 design and documentation.

bullets.heading: Client engagement
bullets.description: Product lead on AI-integrated flagship systems securing ongoing multinational work.

bullets.heading: Market expansion
bullets.description: New implant systems, reverse shoulder sets, and constrained liner combos for broader markets.

bullets.heading: Process efficiency
bullets.description: SolidWorks automation and QMS tracking interfaces reducing repetitive design work.

bullets.heading: Cross-functional leadership
bullets.description: Product lead bridging mechanical, electrical, firmware, and software disciplines.

bullets.heading: Mentorship & training
bullets.description: Manager and mentor for new starters; regular SolidWorks training for junior developers.

bullets.heading: Stakeholder alignment
bullets.description: Weekly client meetings presenting outcomes and aligning priorities across teams.

bullets.heading: Collaborative culture
bullets.description: Known for approachability, trust-building, and open cross-disciplinary collaboration.
